Object.Name: LPWAN mesh mobility info
Object.Description1: This object enables monitoring and management of parameters related with mobility operations of the 802.15.4 based LP-WAN devices.

Item.Name: Network role
Item.Description: 0 - End-Device, 1 - Router, 2 - Border Router, 4 - Bridge, 5 - Gateway

Item.Name: Current rank
Item.Description: The hierarchy of the mesh router/end-device within the network. It may be expressed as the number of hops between the node and the border router/gateway or as the computed cost of the path connecting the node to the border-router/gateway.

Item.Name: Root address
Item.Description: Address or identifier of the border router/gateway node providing connectivity outside the mesh cluster.

Item.Name: Preferred parent
Item.Description: Address or identifier of the nodes selected as the next hop on the optimal path towards the mesh root.

Item.Name: Average communication interval
Item.Description: Average amount of time elapsed between the usage of mesh interface for device-to-device or device-to-cloud, forwarding of messaging.

Item.Name: Parent loss
Item.Description: The number of times the node lost connection to its parent.

Item.Name: Parent change
Item.Description: The number of times the RPL node selected a different preferred parent.

Item.Name: Lowest reported rank
Item.Description: The lowest rank ever held by the device under the current mesh cluster.

Item.Name: Highest reported rank
Item.Description: The highest rank ever held by the device under the current mesh cluster.

Item.Name: Primary root
Item.Description: Address or identifier of the border router/gateway node selected as the primary root.

Item.Name: Root backup 1
Item.Description: Address or identifier of a border router/gateway node to be used as backup to the primary root in case of failure.

Item.Name: Root backup 2
Item.Description: Address or identifier of a border router/gateway node to be used as 2nd backup in case both the primary root and the 1st backup fail.

Item.Name: Parent set list
Item.Description: Ordered list of potential parent nodes in the format (address1 | address2 | address3).

Item.Name: IPv6 prefix
Item.Description: Specifies the IPv6 prefix of the parent device to preferably stay connected to.

Item.Name: Timestamp
Item.Description: The timestamp of when the measurement was performed.
